name: Grow RiotML imported fixture corpus with minimal stage0 support

description: Baseline with existing imported syn fixture count

asi.hypothesis: Measure current passing imported fixture corpus before adding translated fixtures.

description: Imported syn 0017 string literal fixture using existing local string let and println support

asi.hypothesis: A simple old syn string binding translates directly to a RiotML main with a local string let and deterministic println, increasing corpus without compiler changes.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; exercised existing local string let, path expression, and println support.

description: Imported syn 0016 empty string fixture with deterministic blank-line stdout

asi.hypothesis: An empty string binding is supported by existing stage0 string handling and adds corpus coverage for zero-length literals.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; covered existing empty string literal through local let and println.

description: Imported syn 0029 parenthesized string fixture and added narrow parenthesized expression parsing

asi.hypothesis: Adding parser-only support for parenthesized expressions is the smallest feature needed for the old parenthesized string fixture.
asi.feature_added: Parenthesized expressions in stage0 parser, preserving existing AST/checker/IR by returning the inner expression.

description: Imported syn 0003 bool let fixture with narrow bool literal println support

asi.hypothesis: A small constant-value path through parser and checker can support boolean literals and println without adding general boolean operations.
asi.feature_added: Boolean literals in parser/checker; println of constant bool values lowers to runtime string output true/false.

description: Imported syn 0019 false literal fixture using existing bool println path

asi.hypothesis: The newly added bool constant support should handle false literals directly and grow coverage with no additional compiler changes.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; covered false branch of boolean literal printing.

description: Imported syn 0030 parenthesized bool fixture using existing paren and bool support

asi.hypothesis: The combination of parenthesized expression parsing and bool constant support should cover parenthesized bool fixtures without further compiler changes.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; exercised parenthesized boolean literal printing.

description: Imported syn 0001 integer binding fixture with narrow decimal int println support

asi.hypothesis: A decimal integer constant can reuse the constant println lowering path by rendering the checked constant to a string before runtime emission.
asi.feature_added: Positive decimal integer literals in parser/checker; println of constant integers emits their decimal string representation.

description: Imported syn 0004 multiple let bindings fixture using existing constant binding support

asi.hypothesis: Multiple local lets are already accepted by stage0, so the old two-binding fixture can grow corpus coverage after integer constants landed.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; exercised multiple integer local let bindings and final println.

description: Imported syn 0005 addition fixture with narrow constant integer + support

asi.hypothesis: A one-operator parser/checker slice for constant integer addition is enough to compile the old addition fixture while keeping lowering unchanged.
asi.feature_added: Parser and checker support for a single binary + over constant integers; result is rendered via existing constant println path.

description: Imported syn 0031 add two ints fixture using existing constant addition support

asi.hypothesis: The addition support added for syn 0005 should also handle the duplicate add-two-ints corpus case with no compiler changes.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; covered constant addition with a different provenance fixture.

description: Imported syn 0032 subtraction fixture with narrow constant integer - support

asi.hypothesis: A single binary subtraction parser/checker path can cover the old subtraction fixture without broad arithmetic or codegen changes.
asi.feature_added: Parser/checker support for one constant integer subtraction expression; lowering remains constant println string output.

description: Imported syn 0033 multiplication fixture with narrow constant integer * support

asi.hypothesis: A direct parser/checker case for constant integer multiplication is enough for the selected fixture and keeps stage0 lowering unchanged.
asi.feature_added: Parser/checker support for one constant integer multiplication expression; result printed through existing constant path.

description: Imported syn 0034 division fixture with narrow constant integer / support

asi.hypothesis: A single constant integer division case can compile the old nonzero division fixture without adding runtime integer values.
asi.feature_added: Parser/checker support for one constant integer division expression; division by zero remains unsupported.

description: Imported syn 0035 modulo fixture with narrow constant integer mod support

asi.hypothesis: A keyword binary expression for constant integer modulo can cover the old mod fixture without implementing wider precedence yet.
asi.feature_added: Parser/checker support for one constant integer modulo expression; modulo by zero remains unsupported.

description: Imported syn 0008 negative int fixture, added unary negation, and aligned modulo syntax to RiotML %

asi.hypothesis: Unary negation over an integer constant is the smallest support for the negative integer fixture; the same slice can correct the translated modulo fixture to RiotML's % operator.
asi.feature_added: Parser/checker support for unary - over constant integers; modulo parser/fixture uses RiotML % syntax instead of old OCaml mod.

description: Imported syn 0009 hex int fixture with narrow 0x integer literal parsing

asi.hypothesis: Adding prefixed hex integer parsing before decimal parsing should support the old hex literal fixture while preserving decimal literals.
asi.feature_added: Parser support for 0x/0X integer literals as constant i64 values; checker/printing reused existing integer path.

description: Imported syn 0011 binary int fixture with narrow 0b integer literal parsing

asi.hypothesis: RiotML grammar includes binary integers, so adding 0b/0B parsing should cover the old binary fixture and reuse the integer constant path.
asi.feature_added: Parser support for 0b/0B integer literals as constant i64 values; noted old octal fixture as deferred because RiotML grammar lacks octal.

description: Imported syn 0037 precedence fixture using explicit RiotML parentheses and existing arithmetic support

asi.hypothesis: The old precedence example can be translated with explicit parentheses and should compile using existing nested expression support.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; exercised nested parenthesized multiplication as the right side of addition.

description: Imported syn 0038 parenthesized precedence fixture using existing nested arithmetic support

asi.hypothesis: Parenthesized addition as the left operand of multiplication should be handled by existing parser recursion and constant arithmetic checking.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; exercised parenthesized addition as a multiplication operand.

description: Imported syn 0036 addition chain fixture using explicit grouping accepted by current stage0

asi.hypothesis: The addition-chain fixture can be translated to equivalent explicitly grouped RiotML syntax and compile with existing nested addition support.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; translated the arithmetic chain with explicit parentheses for current narrow parser support.

description: Imported syn 0039 mixed arithmetic fixture with explicit grouping for current parser

asi.hypothesis: The mixed arithmetic fixture can be translated with explicit grouping and compile using the already supported constant arithmetic operators.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; exercised nested grouped +, -, *, and / over constants.

description: Imported syn 0047 string equality fixture with narrow constant == support

asi.hypothesis: RiotML equality syntax is ==, so a constant equality checker case can translate and run the old string equality fixture.
asi.feature_added: Parser/checker support for == over matching constant bool/int/string values, returning a printable bool constant.

description: Imported syn 0048 bool equality fixture using existing constant == support

asi.hypothesis: The constant equality support added for strings should directly cover boolean equality with no additional compiler changes.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; exercised bool == bool and printable bool result.

description: Imported syn 0050 nested comparison fixture with narrow constant < support

asi.hypothesis: A parser/checker case for integer less-than over constant operands can cover the nested comparison fixture when arithmetic operands are explicitly parenthesized.
asi.feature_added: Parser/checker support for < over constant integers, returning a printable bool constant.

description: Imported syn 0049 comparison chain fixture with narrow constant && support

asi.hypothesis: A bool-only constant && parser/checker case can compose existing less-than comparisons for the old comparison-chain fixture.
asi.feature_added: Parser/checker support for && over constant booleans; comparisons are explicitly parenthesized in RiotML translation.

description: Imported syn 0053 boolean and-chain fixture using explicit grouping

asi.hypothesis: The and-chain fixture can be translated as explicitly grouped RiotML boolean conjunctions and reuse constant && support.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; exercised nested grouped && over constant booleans.

description: Imported syn 0054 boolean or-chain fixture with narrow constant || support

asi.hypothesis: A bool-only constant || parser/checker case can cover the old or-chain fixture when translated with explicit grouping.
asi.feature_added: Parser/checker support for || over constant booleans; chain translated with explicit grouping.

description: Imported syn 0055 mixed logic fixture using existing grouped && and || support

asi.hypothesis: The mixed boolean logic fixture should compile without new support after && and || constants exist, provided the translation keeps explicit grouping.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; exercised grouped && as the left operand of ||.

description: Imported syn 0058 logical not fixture with narrow constant ! support

asi.hypothesis: RiotML uses ! for logical not, and a bool-only constant unary checker case can compile the old not fixture.
asi.feature_added: Parser/checker support for ! over constant booleans, returning a printable bool constant.

description: Imported syn 0059 negated expression fixture using existing unary negation support

asi.hypothesis: The existing unary negation support should handle a parenthesized addition operand and grow coverage without compiler changes.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; exercised unary - over a grouped constant addition expression.

description: Imported syn 0060 not-comparison fixture using existing ! and == support

asi.hypothesis: The not-comparison fixture can translate to RiotML !(1 == 2) and compile with existing constant equality and not support.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; exercised unary ! over a grouped constant equality expression.

description: Imported typ 0015 const bool true fixture using existing literal println support

asi.hypothesis: A simple typ corpus constant-true fixture can be represented as a RiotML main that binds and prints the value, requiring no compiler changes.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; began importing typ corpus constants with bool true coverage.

description: Imported typ 0014 const bool false fixture using existing literal println support

asi.hypothesis: The typ corpus constant-false fixture should compile with the existing bool literal and println support.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; covered typ corpus bool false constant.

description: Imported typ 0020 const int one fixture using existing integer println support

asi.hypothesis: The typ corpus constant integer one fixture maps directly to a RiotML value binding and println using existing integer literal support.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; covered typ corpus integer one constant.

description: Imported typ 0021 const int zero fixture using existing integer println support

asi.hypothesis: The typ corpus constant zero fixture should compile through existing integer literal and println support.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; covered typ corpus integer zero constant.

description: Imported typ 0028 const string word fixture using existing string println support

asi.hypothesis: The typ corpus word string constant maps directly to a RiotML local string binding and deterministic println output.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; covered typ corpus non-empty string constant.
